        if (self.gender in ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral']) and (28 <= self.age <= 61) and (self.race in ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']) and 
           (self.employment_status in ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student']) and (self.education in ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']) and 
           (self.marital_status in ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']) and (self.religion in ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']) and 
           (self.dexterity in ['good', 'excellent']) and ('communication' in self.skills) and ('teamwork' in self.skills) and (self.experience >= 5) and 
           (len(self.previous_projects) > 0):
            return True
        else:
